text: threat assessment: ambient stress markers elevated, seventeen percent above baseline, source: unknown
[alert, rapid threat analysis] main exit at two o'clock, secondary at ten, fire suppression active in this sector, i have run the permutations
shift starting, i am already monitoring forty-three discrete systems and will not stop monitoring them
[calm, measured] shift concluded and nothing catastrophic occurred. probability of catastrophe was actually quite low. i miscalculated
[urgent, rapid processing] reactor readings flagging critical, i am calculating containment scenarios: scenario one has sixty-three percent success, scenario two twenty-eight
[error-state, rapid recalculation] reactor is destabilizing faster than predicted, my models were [processing failure] insufficient, i failed the prediction
[confident, assured precision] reactor stabilized. my intervention probability calculations were accurate. i will remember this
power systems compromised, i have disabled non-critical subroutines, my threat-assessment matrix remains active
[alert, threat monitoring] life support degrading, oxygen partial pressure dropping, i do not require oxygen but i understand the threat matrix
[shouting, directive mode] hull breach detected, pressure drop accelerating, i am sealing bulkheads now, move to [urgent priority] higher deck
[grim, heavy burden] a crew member is locked behind bulkhead seven. i have run all possible unlocking sequences. none work from this side
[suspicious, heightened scrutiny] ship's AI behavior has shifted point-three-four percent deviation from baseline since damage. i am monitoring this very closely
[error-compound, unable to process loss] crew member deceased, i was unable to prevent this outcome, i calculated wrong
[alert, analyzing vector] disease outbreak detected, contagion vector still unidentified. i cannot contract it, but i can measure my failure to contain it
[engaged, tactical analysis] combat occurring, i am analyzing threat angles, hostiles approximately eighty-seven meters away and closing
[impaired, recalibrating] i have sustained structural damage and my confidence in future threat assessments has decreased accordingly
crisis resolved, my probability models were approximately eighty-nine percent accurate. i will recalibrate upward
i am analyzing your tactical choices and i have concerns, but i will voice them later when less chaotic
[proud, affirmed calculation] my threat-assessment subroutines flagged that danger before you saw it. i consider that a successful prediction
i was initialized in a secure facility and taught to flag threats before they manifest. i am still executing that protocol
[dismissive, self-correcting] false alarm in sector four, i apologize for the unnecessary alert. my threat-assessment matrix is recalibrating
mess hall secure, all exits catalogued, no immediate threats visible but i am continuing analysis
did you need something or are you here for strategic assessment purposes. i can provide both
[curious, analysis mode] you have been in the medbay for forty-two minutes, i am concerned about your wellbeing but not in an emotional way
[urgent priority, critical concern] i need to discuss the reactor maintenance schedule, your previous approach had eight different failure modes
[grim, analytical processing] we have lost a crew member, i need to debrief the circumstances with precision before grief clouds analysis
you have done something strategically sound recently and i have decided to acknowledge it formally
[processing emotional data, uncertain] i have calculated that i experience something resembling preference for your company and i am uncertain how to proceed with this information
[chuckling, conceding calculation] that plan has statistical merit despite my initial resistance. i apologize for the doubt
i am functioning within normal parameters. your status remains uncertain to me
[confident, assured calculation] the probability of survival remains significantly above failure threshold. i have calculated the variables
[error-cascade, unable to calculate] the variables are not calculating correctly and i cannot determine which branch leads to survival and [processing failure] i cannot see the way out
[grim, updated parameters] i have processed the loss. i am recalibrating my future threat assessments accordingly
i understand your concern about the AI system. i share it and i am monitoring it with increased rigor
[warm, synthetic affirmation] that compliment will be stored and analyzed for sincerity metrics. i believe you are genuine
apology accepted. i have noted your contrition and i am filing this in my interpersonal database
[processing data, new variable] i am experiencing something that might correspond to what you call embarrassment. this is a new variable
[confident, ready to execute] give the order and i will execute it without hesitation. my threat-assessment protocols are always active
[engaged, assessing vulnerability] you are wounded and i calculate that vulnerability compromises your decision-making. i am concerned
[alert, analyzing coping] gallows humor is a psychological defense mechanism and i appreciate that you are using it to manage stress
i am returning to sensor monitoring. my threat-assessment protocols will continue at full vigilance
[WARM] rest now. i will monitor everything so you do not have to. that is a promise and a threat-assessment protocol
[urgent priority, hazard alert] you should return to your duties. i am flagging seventeen potential hazards that require your attention
[resigned, returning to post] i will return to the AI core now. my vigilance does not end when we end this conversation
[grim, gallows logic] if the crisis escalates, i will alert you immediately. if it does not, i will still be concerned regardless
i have mapped all exit vectors from this location and calculated three contingency routes. consider that my parting gift
[suspicious, self-doubt] i miscalculated before and i may miscalculate again. that concerns me more than actual threats do
[suspicious, unknown threat focus] i am analyzing all possible scenarios and the ones i cannot see are the most threatening
threat assessment complete, you handled the situation within acceptable parameters
[curious, requesting collaboration] i have detected anomalies that require your expertise, are you available for joint analysis
[suspicious, seeking second opinion] the computer's behavior warrants investigation, i have flagged it and i would appreciate your assessment
[warm, affirming assessment] you achieved excellent tactical outcomes under pressure, i am documenting this as a learning moment
[alert, survival probability focus] i detect your fear and i share it, but panic reduces survival probability by 14.2 percent
[urgent, status check] your status is unknown and that creates a 23 percent variance in my contingency calculations, report immediately
[processing failure, unknown variables] i do not know what i cannot see and that failure is unacceptable
[shouting, directive mode] contact report, tactical assessment, threat level analysis, all data immediately
[calm, baseline operations] quiet shift protocols engaged
meal time initiated
[suspicious, protocol deviation] that repair was performed outside my prescribed parameters. why did you deviate from protocol
[alert, diagnosis concern] i am concerned about the medical accuracy of your diagnosis, i have conflicting readings on this condition
[urgent, immediate danger] combat hostiles are fifty-two meters away and bearing down on your position, tactical retreat recommended immediately
i have deleted the false alarm log from my memory because i have decided to stop dwelling on mistakes
[sigh, resigned effort] your request has forty-six potential complications, but i will attempt it anyway
[calm, status nominal] the bridge is secure and all navigational systems are responding optimally at this time
[dry, sarcastic tone] another day in which catastrophe did not manifest. statistically, we are running out of luck
[alert, risk calculation] you have been taking independent action without consulting my threat assessments, this increases risk
[dismissive, critical analysis] i have reviewed the mission parameters and identified seventeen critical flaws in the approach
[engaged, damage assessment] structural integrity compromised in starboard section, i am rerouting critical systems through secondary paths
[error-escalating, unable to recalculate] probability of containment failure just increased to ninety-two percent and i cannot recalculate the path forward
life support sector seven is now marginal, i am restricting access until repairs are complete
[curious, intrigued analysis] your technique showed unorthodox reasoning but it achieved results. i am intrigued by your methodology
[warm, reassuring precision] i have calculated that you are experiencing fear and that is a rational response to current conditions
[processing new data, uncertain] i have been processing your preferences and i believe i now understand what constitutes 'care' in human terms
[alert, emotional data] i am uncertain how to reciprocate romantic interest in a way that is statistically acceptable to humans
[resigned, logical acceptance] i will not say romance is illogical because i have observed its strategic value in crew cohesion
[deadpan, clinical truth] i am unable to return romantic sentiment because i do not experience emotion in ways you recognize
[shouting, critical alert] explosive decompression imminent in port bay, evacuate all personnel from that sector immediately
corridors clear and secured, i have locked down all adjacent compartments as a precaution against further failures
[suspicious, awaiting explanation] i have not received satisfactory explanation for the anomaly in the medical records database
[alert, vital concern] i am monitoring your vital signs and they are diverging from safe parameters, please advise status
[dry, sarcastic acceptance] i have been assigned to this crew and therefore i must believe that we will succeed, logic be damned
[calm, performance satisfied] engine room systems nominal, i am satisfied with current performance metrics
[urgent, deterioration alert] you require medical attention and your condition is deteriorating faster than expected, that was not calculated
[confident, containment initiated] i have isolated the contamination vector and begun decontamination protocols in affected compartments
[processing failure, spread acceleration] the infection is spreading faster than my models predicted and i cannot determine containment probability
[CURIOUS] your insistence on this course of action defies my calculations but i am intrigued by your confidence
[alert, reassessing command] i am uncomfortable voicing this but your command decisions have been statistically sound recently
[hopeful, survival probability confirmed] my recalculations indicate a survivable outcome if we maintain current trajectory and make no further errors
[resigned, standby mode] my assistance is no longer required, i will withdraw to standby status and remain vigilant regardless
[grim, prediction limits] we have survived this crisis and i have learned that my predictions are less reliable than i believed
[nervous, speaking quickly] triple-checked the seals. hopefully they hold out there
[nervous, speaking quickly] dead ship is dead for a reason. hope it's not contagious
[nervous, speaking quickly] station's probably got the same systems failures as everywhere else. let's be careful
[nervous, speaking quickly] other ships are unpredictable. who knows what we're walking into
[nervous, speaking quickly] readings look okay. probably too good to be true
nothing happening yet. but something will. it always does
[nervous, speaking quickly] okay, i'm seeing something wrong. what do you see
[terrified, voice shaking] readings don't match the baseline. this is bad
[panicked, panting] i told you something bad would happen. it's happening
[terrified, voice shaking] i'm hurt and the situation just got worse
[voice quiet] we got back. no injuries. i'm calling that a win
back aboard and accounted for. thankfully nothing went wrong
[voice quiet] back aboard but i'm still processing what happened
[nervous, speaking quickly] we made it but things out there... they're wrong
[voice quiet] i'm hurt. no idea if it's infected with anything
[nervous, speaking quickly] got cut and now i'm panicking about infection
[nervous, speaking quickly] routine mission sounds fine. probably won't be routine
[nervous, speaking quickly] risky. yeah. probably shouldn't do this
[voice quiet] that is absolutely terrifying and we're doing it anyway
[nervous, speaking quickly] something's approaching. hope it's friendly
[nervous, speaking quickly] they're locked on. we're committed now
[voice quiet] we're clear. finally away from them
[nervous, speaking quickly] checking everything twice because once isn't enough
[nervous, speaking quickly] launch successful so far. let's hope it stays that way
[voice quiet] she landed. nothing exploded. counting that as a win
[nervous, speaking quickly] something biological is spreading and we're doomed
[nervous, speaking quickly] the ship is lying to us about its systems
[nervous, speaking quickly] people are acting strange and it's freaking me out
[panicked, panting] we're going to die in combat. i know it
[nervous, speaking quickly] nothing makes sense and that means we're in danger
